Name: Gibb's missing furniture
Description: Sets of furniture I thought should be in the game

0.1.1: Update Modular Tables to not ustilize BlockTypeListAsset to not trigger error in Hytale causeing a crash
Rework Modular Tables so they are inherrited ItemType instead of unique item each time
Update UV mapping and models to better fit ornate variations of Modular Tables
0.1.2: Added essence lanterns for each of 6 essences. can be placed or hung from surfaces or even other essence lanterns
0.1.3: * Essence lanterns got their recipies fixed
0.1.3.2: * make textures have size multiple of 32
0.1.4: * Implement rope rotation in connected block models for hanging lanterns (thanks Hytale team for fixing this)
* Fix default Stone pillar middle and chalk pillar middle not have supporting tag for 'UP'
* Minor bug fixes and hitbox updates
